name: sigmetrics-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM SIGMETRICS submissions published in POMACS (Proceedings of the ACM on Measurement and Analysis of Computing Systems): venue routing among the performance-evaluation venues, the three-cycles-per-year rolling deadlines (summer/fall/winter), the hybrid conference-journal review with its one-shot revision and mandatory shepherding, double-anonymous acmsmall submission, the theory/measurement/learning-for-systems blend, and ACM artifact badging. Grounded in the SIGMETRICS 2026/2027 calls, the POMACS journal pages, ACM DL, and dblp checked on 2026-07-09.
